ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Close Of The Estate

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-17-2022 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-23-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance required. Pro forma hearing only for purposes of admitting will.

This matter is on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will, the Court noting that notice of the proceedings appears to be complete and that no objection has been made to the Petition. The Court grants the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The Will dated May 17, 2013 is admitted to probate. Alexander Eugene Ivanoff is appointed the Executor of the estate with full authority under the Independent Administration of Estates Act. Bond is waived. Order for the same is signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for hearing on June 20, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. If a Petition for Final Distribution or Petition to Request Additional Time to Administer Estate is filed 1 week before that date, the matter will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Court Examiner: Sandra Hilton; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
